remember: Recall definitions of key terms related to psychology and sports
Identify the role of psychology in sports performance
List the different types of motivation in sports
Describe the concept of anxiety in sports
understand: Explain the relationship between personality and sports performance
Discuss the impact of attitude on sports performance
Describe the different types of learning theories and their application in sports
Explain the concept of team dynamics and its importance in sports
apply: Apply motivation theories to improve sports performance
Analyze the role of anxiety in sports performance and develop strategies to manage it
Design a training program based on learning theories
Develop a team building plan based on team dynamics principles
analyze: Analyze the impact of psychological factors on sports performance
Compare and contrast different motivation theories and their application in sports
Evaluate the effectiveness of learning theories in improving sports performance
Analyze the role of team dynamics in achieving team goals

ncert_objectives: To understand the role of psychology in sports performance
To identify the different types of motivation and their impact on sports performance
To explain the concept of anxiety and its impact on sports performance
To describe the different types of learning theories and their application in sports
board_exam_objectives: To analyze the psychological factors affecting sports performance
To apply motivation theories to improve sports performance
To design a training program based on learning theories
To evaluate the effectiveness of psychological interventions in sports performance
